title: mimulus glabratus subsp. fremontii
intro: Mimulus glabratus subsp. fremontii, also known as Fremont's monkey flower or desert monkey flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. This plant is native to the southwestern United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Mimulus glabratus subsp. fremontii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antispasmodic, making it useful for treating anxiety and insomnia. Mimulus glabratus subsp. fremontii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
